summary: PR #2759 was a one-line configure.py linkage update that moved melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder.c from NonMatching to Matching in the MatchingFor object list. The loaded evidence includes no source-body changes, no review comments, and only a bot progress report plus a brief issue comment.

what_changed.text: In configure.py inside MatchingFor, the itpikachuthunder item object was changed from NonMatching to Matching.
No C source diff for melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder.c is present in this PR slice; the PR only updates its build/matching classification.

smart_moves.text: Kept the PR scoped to the linkage-status flip for one object file, avoiding unrelated cleanup or source churn in the submitted diff.

decomp_lessons.text: A file can be promoted from NonMatching to Matching through configure.py once its object is ready to link as matching; this PR is evidence of the repository workflow for reflecting that status in the build list, not evidence about the source tactics used to achieve the match.

naming_conventions.text: The item source path/name used in the build list is melee/it/items/itpikachuthunder.c, preserving the lowercase item naming convention visible among neighboring item files.
